folio.label: 129v
folio.l: His lady certes , and his wyf also
To whicú , that lawe of loue , accordetú to
And whan he was , in this prosperitee
Hoom witú his wyf , he gootú to his contree
Nat fer fro Pedmarkã , there his dwellyngö was
Where as he lyuetú , in blisse and in solas
¢ Who coude telle , but he had wedded be
The ioye , the ese , and the prosperitee
That is bytwixte , an husbonde , and his wyf
A ©ere and more , lastetú this blisful lif
Til that the knygút , of whicú I speke of thus
That of kairud , was cleped Arueregus
Shoop~ hi~ to gon , and dwelled a ©ere or tweyne
In Engelond , that cleped was eke Bretaigne
To seke in armes , worshipe and honour
For al his lust , he sette in swicú labour
And dwelled there , two ©ere , the book seitú thus
¢ Now wol I stynten , of this Arueragus
And speken I wol , of Dorigen his wif
That louetú hire husbonde , as hire hertes lyf
For his absence , wepetú she and syketú
As doon theise noble wyues , whan he~ liketú
She mornetú , waketú , wayletú , fastetú , pleynetú
Desire of his presence , hire so destreynetú
That al this wyde world , she sette at nougút
Hire frendes , whicú that knewe , hire heuy thougút
Conforten hire , in al that euäe they may
They prechen hire , they tellen hire , nygút & day
That causelees , she sletú hire self , allas
And euäy confort , possible in this cas
They don to hire , witú al here besynesse
Al for to make hire leue , hire heuynesse
¢ By processe , as ©e knowen euäychonö
Men moun so longe , grauen in a stonö
Til som figure , ther Inne empreynted be
So longe han they , conforted hire , til she
Receyued hatú , by hope and by resou~
The empryntynge , of hire consolaciouö
Thurgú whicú , hire gret sorwe , gan a swage
She may nat alwey duren , in swicú rage
¢ And eke Arueragus , in al this care
Hatú sent hire lettres hom , of his welfare
And that he wol come hastily , a geyn
Or elles had this sorwe , hire hert slayn
¢ Hire frendes saugú , hire sorwe gan to slake
